Celebrating Bharat Beyond Boundaries Param is a purpose driven public trust, an organization that promotes science, culture, art, history, and open innovation through a network of collaborative transdisciplinary hubs.

Our Verticals

History
Science
Culture

Visit Our Centers

Parsec Jayanagar, Bengaluru

ParSEC, Param Science Experience Centre, Jayanagar, Bengaluru is Param's first immersive, interactive, experiential science gallery and living lab. Parsec, Jayanagar has welcomed over 75,000+ visitors in 2024-25. This unique space offers hands-on learning through exhibits, workshops, and programs that make science fun, accessible, and engaging for all ages.
Know More


International Flagship Centre

The Param Flagship Centre in Chenanahalli, Bengaluru is India's largest transdisciplinary hub, spanning 1.2 million sq. ft. It brings together science, culture, history, innovation, and immersive learning under one roof. Know More


Parsec Whitefield, Bengaluru

Opening in March 2026, the Whitefield Experience Centre will bring Param's immersive science and culture experience to East Bengaluru. It will feature interactive exhibits, a makerspace, events room, and a cozy community café.

Join The Movement

Support The Cause

Join us in shaping the future of science exploration and education. At Param, we believe in the power of collective action to inspire scientific curiosity and innovation. Through diverse engagement opportunities, we're building a vibrant community where everyone can contribute to advancing scientific understanding and discovery.

Donate

Support India's innovative science centre. Your contribution shapes the future of science education.

Membership

Join our community for exclusive access to workshops, events, and cutting-edge facilities.

Partnership

Partner with us to create impactful science programs that inspire future generations.

Volunteer

Join us on this quirky expedition, where curiosity meets action, passion meets purpose and volunteering is the coolest experiment of all! Make an impact by joining Param Volunteer Team

About Us

Param Is a Foundation Reimagining How India Experiences Learning, Culture, and Innovation.

Param is a transdisciplinary ecosystem and a collaborative platform that brings together science, history, art, culture, and technology to ignite curiosity, inspire collaboration, and create meaningful societal change. At our core, we are community-builders - educators, artists, scientists, technologists, performers, and dreamers - united by a shared belief: knowledge should be lived, not just learned.
